summary: Vertical video. A handheld selfie-style vlog of DHS Secretary Mark Mullin giving a tour of his office, showing bouncy balls with agency seals and a cafeteria burger, and speaking about DHS employees working unpaid during the shutdown, with TikTok-style auto-captions. It is a talking-head vlog with no music track.
notable_text: ANYWAYS JUST WANT; MY TOP FIVE (auto-captions)
